rationale: Three PRs is not enough signal to revise trigger thresholds. All triggers (3-strike-review, token-explosion, wall-clock-overrun) ran in seed-uncalibrated default state and zero of them fired. Observed values are well below the current thresholds: max tokens out ~52k vs threshold 200k; max wall-clock 15m vs threshold 90m; zero review rejections. Per TRIGGER-CONSERVATISM-UNTIL-CALIBRATED the right thing is to keep collecting data. Revisit after ~5 sprints under this skill version.
